records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Time Which, if a Person Reaches it, They Are Considered to Have Performed tamattu‘
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.2769 - Al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id narrated from Hammad, from Muhammad ibn Maymun, who said: Imam Abu al-Hasan (as) arrived performing tamattu‘ on the night of Arafah. He performed tawaf, exited ihram, approached one of his servant women, then entered ihram for Hajj and proceeded [to Mina].
records.arabicText: 2769 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ قَالَ : قَدِمَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ مُتَمَتِّعاً، لَيْلَةَ عَرَفَةَ فَطَافَ وَ أَحَلَّ وَ أَتَى بَعْضَ جَوَارِيهِ ثُمَّ أَهَلَّ بِالْحَجِّ وَ خَرَجَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2769 - Al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id narrated from Hammad, from Muhammad ibn Maymun, who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam Abu al-Hasan (as) arrived performing tamattu‘ on the night of Arafah. He performed tawaf, exited ihram, approached one of his servant women, then entered ihram for Hajj and proceeded [to Mina].

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Time Which, if a Person Reaches it, They Are Considered to Have Performed tamattu‘
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2770 - It is narrated from Abu Basir, who said: I said to Abu Abdullah (as):
"A woman performing tamattu‘ begins menstruating before she performs tawaf of the Kaaba, and her purification occurs on the night of Arafah. What should she do?"
Imam (as) said: "If she knows that she will become pure, perform tawaf of the Kaaba, exit ihram, and join the people in Mina, then she should do so."
records.arabicText: 2770 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلْمَرْأَةُ تَجِيءُ مُتَمَتِّعَةً فَتَطْمَثُ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَطُوفَ بِالْبَيْتِ فَيَكُونُ طُهْرُهَا لَيْلَةَ عَرَفَةَ فَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ «إِنْ كَانَتْ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّهَا تَطْهُرُ وَ تَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ وَ تَحِلُّ مِنْ إِحْرَامِهَا وَ تَلْحَقُ اَلنَّاسَ بِمِنًى فَلْتَفْعَلْ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2770 - It is narrated from Abu Basir, who said: I said to Abu Abdullah (as):
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"A woman performing tamattu‘ begins menstruating before she performs tawaf of the Kaaba, and her purification occurs on the night of Arafah. What should she do?"
Imam (as) said: "If she knows that she will become pure, perform tawaf of the Kaaba, exit ihram, and join the people in Mina, then she should do so."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Time Which, if a Person Reaches it, They Are Considered to Have Performed tamattu‘
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2771 - Al-Nadr narrated from Shu‘ayb al-‘Aqarqufi, who said: I and Hadid set out until we reached the orchard on the Day of Tarwiyah. I went ahead on a donkey, arrived in Mecca, performed tawaf and sa‘i, exited my ihram from tamattu‘, and entered ihram for Hajj. Hadid arrived later that night. I wrote to Abu al-Hasan (as), seeking guidance regarding his situation.
Imam (as) wrote back to me: "Instruct him to perform tawaf, sa‘i, exit his ihram from tamattu‘, then enter ihram for Hajj, join the people in Mina, and ensure he does not spend the night in Mecca."
records.arabicText: 2771 - وَ رَوَى اَلنَّضْرُ عَنْ شُعَيْبٍ اَلْعَقَرْقُوفِيِّ قَالَ : خَرَجْتُ أَنَا وَ حَدِيدٌ فَانْتَهَيْنَا إِلَى اَلْبُسْتَانِ ، يَوْمَ اَلتَّرْوِيَةِ فَتَقَدَّمْتُ عَلَى حِمَارٍ فَقَدِمْتُ مَكَّةَ وَ طُفْتُ وَ سَعَيْتُ وَ أَحْلَلْتُ مِنْ تَمَتُّعِي ثُمَّ أَحْرَمْتُ بِالْحَجِّ وَ قَدِمَ حَدِيدٌ مِنَ اَللَّيْلِ فَكَتَبْتُ إِلَى أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اِسْتَفْتَيْتُهُ فِي أَمْرِهِ فَكَتَبَ إِلَيَّ «مُرْهُ يَطُوفُ وَ يَسْعَى وَ يَحِلُّ مِنْ مُتْعَتِهِ وَ يُحْرِمُ بِالْحَجِّ وَ يَلْحَقُ اَلنَّاسَ بِمِنًى وَ لاَ يَبِيتَنَّ بِمَكَّةَ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.2771 - Al-Nadr narrated from Shu‘ayb al-‘Aqarqufi, who said: I and Hadid set out until we reached the orchard on the Day of Tarwiyah. I went ahead on a donkey, arrived in Mecca, performed tawaf and sa‘i, exited my ihram from tamattu‘, and entered ihram for Hajj. Hadid arrived later that night. I wrote to Abu al-Hasan (as), seeking guidance regarding his situation.
Imam (as) wrote back to me:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Instruct him to perform tawaf, sa‘i, exit his ihram from tamattu‘, then enter ihram for Hajj, join the people in Mina, and ensure he does not spend the night in Mecca."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Time Which, if a Person Reaches it, They Are Considered to Have Performed tamattu‘
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2772 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Ali ibn Ri'ab, from Durays al-Kunasi, from Abu Ja'far (as), who said: I asked him about a man who set out to perform tamattu‘ (Umrah followed by Hajj) but did not reach Mecca until the Day of Sacrifice (Yawm al-Nahr).
Imam (as) said: "He should remain in Mecca in his state of ihram, cease reciting the Talbiyah upon entering the Haram, perform tawaf of the Kaaba, perform sa‘i, shave his head, and slaughter his sheep. Then he may return to his family."
Imam (as) further said: "This applies to one who made a condition with his Lord (azj) at the time of ihram, stating that he would exit ihram wherever he was held back. If he did not make such a condition, then he is required to perform both Hajj and Umrah in the following year."
records.arabicText: 2772 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ ضُرَيْسٍ اَلْكُنَاسِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ خَرَجَ مُتَمَتِّعاً بِعُمْرَةٍ إِلَى اَلْحَجِّ فَلَمْ يَبْلُغْ مَكَّةَ إِلاَّ يَوْمَ اَلنَّحْرِ فَقَالَ «يُقِيمُ بِمَكَّةَ عَلَى إِحْرَامِهِ وَ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ حِينَ يَدْخُلُ اَلْحَرَمَ فَيَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ وَ يَسْعَى وَ يَحْلِقُ رَأْسَهُ وَ يَذْبَحُ شَاتَهُ ثُمَّ يَنْصَرِفُ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ» ثُمَّ قَالَ «هَذَا لِمَنِ اِشْتَرَطَ عَلَى رَبِّهِ عِنْدَ إِحْرَامِهِ أَنْ يَحُلَّهُ حَيْثُ حَبَسَهُ فَإِنْ لَمْ يَشْتَرِطْ فَإِنَّ عَلَيْهِ اَلْحَجَّ وَ اَلْعُمْرَةَ مِنْ قَابِلٍ».

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Time Which, if a Person Reaches it, They Are Considered to Have Performed Hajj
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.2773 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Hisham ibn al-Hakam, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: "Whoever reaches al-Mash'ar al-Haram (the Sacred Monument) with five individuals has indeed attained Hajj."
records.arabicText: 2773 - رَوَى اِبْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ اَلْحَكَمِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مَنْ أَدْرَكَ اَلْمَشْعَرَ اَلْحَرَامَ عَلَى خَمْسَةٍ مِنَ اَلنَّاسِ فَقَدْ أَدْرَكَ اَلْحَجَّ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2773 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Hisham ibn al-Hakam, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever reaches al-Mash'ar al-Haram (the Sacred Monument) with five individuals has indeed attained Hajj."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Time Which, if a Person Reaches it, They Are Considered to Have Performed Hajj
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.2774 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Jamil ibn Darraj, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: "Whoever reaches the standing at Muzdalifah (Jam‘) on the Day of Sacrifice (Yawm al-Nahr) before the sun passes its zenith has indeed attained Hajj."
records.arabicText: 2774 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ جَمِيلِ بْنِ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مَنْ أَدْرَكَ اَلْمَوْقِفَ بِجَمْعٍ يَوْمَ اَلنَّحْرِ مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ تَزُولَ اَلشَّمْسُ فَقَدْ أَدْرَكَ اَلْحَجَّ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2774 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Jamil ibn Darraj, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever reaches the standing at Muzdalifah (Jam‘) on the Day of Sacrifice (Yawm al-Nahr) before the sun passes its zenith has indeed attained Hajj."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Time Which, if a Person Reaches it, They Are Considered to Have Performed Hajj
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.2775 - Abdullah ibn al-Mughira narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: "Whoever reaches al-Mash'ar al-Haram (the Sacred Monument) before the sun passes its zenith has indeed attained Hajj."
records.arabicText: 2775 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ اَلْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مَنْ أَدْرَكَ اَلْمَشْعَرَ اَلْحَرَامَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَزُولَ اَلشَّمْسُ فَقَدْ أَدْرَكَ اَلْحَجَّ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2775 - Abdullah ibn al-Mughira narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever reaches al-Mash'ar al-Haram (the Sacred Monument) before the sun passes its zenith has indeed attained Hajj."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Time Which, if a Person Reaches it, They Are Considered to Have Performed Hajj
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2776 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated that Abu Abdullah (as) said to him:
"If someone reaches the standing (at Arafat) before the sun passes its zenith, they have attained the standing."
records.arabicText: 2776 - وَ رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِذَا أَدْرَكَ اَلزَّوَالَ فَقَدْ أَدْرَكَ اَلْمَوْقِفَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2776 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated that Abu Abdullah (as) said to him:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "If someone reaches the standing (at Arafat) before the sun passes its zenith, they have attained the standing."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing the Tawaf of Hajj and the Tawaf of Women Before sa’y and Before Departing to Mina
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2777 - Ishaq ibn Ammar narrated from Sama'ah ibn Mehran, from Imam Abu Al-Hasan Al-Madhi (as), who said: I asked him about a man who performed the Tawaf of Hajj and the Tawaf al-Nisa before performing the sa‘i between Safa and Marwa.
Imam (as) said: "It does not harm him; he should perform the sa‘i between Safa and Marwa, and he has completed his Hajj."
records.arabicText: 2777 - رَوَى إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ اَلْمَاضِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ طَافَ طَوَافَ اَلْحَجِّ وَ طَوَافَ اَلنِّسَاءِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْعَى بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ قَالَ «لاَ يَضُرُّهُ يَطُوفُ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ وَ قَدْ فَرَغَ مِنْ حَجِّهِ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.2777 - Ishaq ibn Ammar narrated from Sama'ah ibn Mehran, from Imam Abu Al-Hasan Al-Madhi (as), who said: I asked him about a man who performed the Tawaf of Hajj and the Tawaf al-Nisa before performing the sa‘i between Safa and Marwa.
Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "It does not harm him; he should perform the sa‘i between Safa and Marwa, and he has completed his Hajj."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing the Tawaf of Hajj and the Tawaf of Women Before sa’y and Before Departing to Mina
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2778 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Hafs ibn al-Bukhtari, from Abu al-Hasan (as), regarding performing the tawaf early before going to Mina.
Imam (as) said: "It is the same, whether he delays it or performs it earlier."
records.arabicText: 2778 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَفْصِ بْنِ اَلْبَخْتَرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي تَعْجِيلِ اَلطَّوَافِ قَبْلَ اَلْخُرُوجِ إِلَى مِنًى فَقَالَ «هُمَا سَوَاءٌ أَخَّرَ ذَلِكَ أَوْ قَدَّمَهُ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2778 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Hafs ibn al-Bukhtari, from Abu al-Hasan (as), regarding performing the tawaf early before going to Mina.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "It is the same, whether he delays it or performs it earlier."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing the Tawaf of Hajj and the Tawaf of Women Before sa’y and Before Departing to Mina
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2779 - Ibn Bukayr narrated from Zurara, from Abu Ja'far (as), and Jamil narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), that they were asked about a person performing tamattu‘ who performs their tawaf and sa‘i for Hajj earlier than usual.
They (as) said: "It is the same, whether you perform them earlier or later."
records.arabicText: 2779 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ بُكَيْرٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ رَوَى جَمِيلٌ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُمَا سَأَلاَهُمَا عَنِ اَلْمُتَمَتِّعِ يُقَدِّمُ طَوَافَهُ وَ سَعْيَهُ فِي اَلْحَجِّ فَقَالاَ «هُمَا سِيَّانِ قَدَّمْتَ أَوْ أَخَّرْتَ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2779 - Ibn Bukayr narrated from Zurara, from Abu Ja'far (as), and Jamil narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), that they were asked about a person performing tamattu‘ who performs their tawaf and sa‘i for Hajj earlier than usual.
records.thaqalaynMatn: They (as) said: "It is the same, whether you perform them earlier or later."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing the Tawaf of Hajj and the Tawaf of Women Before sa’y and Before Departing to Mina
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2780 - Safwan ibn Yahya narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar, who said: I asked Imam Abu Ibrahim (as) about a person performing tamattu‘ who is an elderly man or a woman fearing menstruation—can they perform the tawaf for Hajj earlier, before going to Mina?
Imam (as) said: "Yes, for someone in such a situation, they may perform it earlier."
Imam (as) was also asked about a man who enters ihram for Hajj in Mecca, then sees the Kaaba empty and decides to perform tawaf before leaving for Mina.
Imam (as) said: "No."
records.arabicText: 2780 - وَ رَوَى صَفْوَانُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلْمُتَمَتِّعِ إِذَا كَانَ شَيْخاً كَبِيراً أَوِ اِمْرَأَةً تَخَافُ اَلْحَيْضَ يُعَجِّلُ اَلطَّوَافَ لِلْحَجِّ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَأْتِيَ مِنًى قَالَ «نَعَمْ مَنْ هُوَ هَكَذَا يُعَجِّلُ» قَالَ وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ يُحْرِمُ بِالْحَجِّ مِنْ مَكَّةَ ثُمَّ يَرَى اَلْبَيْتَ خَالِياً فَيَطُوفُ بِهِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَخْرُجَ عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ فَقَالَ «لاَ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2780 - Safwan ibn Yahya narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar, who said: I asked Imam Abu Ibrahim (as) about a person performing tamattu‘ who is an elderly man or a woman fearing menstruation—can they perform the tawaf for Hajj earlier, before going to Mina?
records.thaqalaynMatn:
Imam (as) said: "Yes, for someone in such a situation, they may perform it earlier."
Imam (as) was also asked about a man who enters ihram for Hajj in Mecca, then sees the Kaaba empty and decides to perform tawaf before leaving for Mina.
Imam (as) said: "No."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Delaying the Visit (ziyarah)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: The "Tawaf al-Ziyadah" is called "Ziyara" (visitation) because the pilgrim comes from Mina to visit the Sacred House but does not stay in Mecca and returns to Mina afterward. It is preferable for the pilgrim to perform this tawaf on the Day of Sacrifice (Yawm al-Nahr) after completing the rites of Mina. If that is not possible, it should be performed on the eleventh day. It should not be delayed beyond this, and some scholars, such as in Rawdat al-Mutayaqin, have stated that delaying it is prohibited.
records.arabicText: يسمى طواف الزيادة زيارة لان الحاج يأتي من منى فيزور البيت ولا يقيم بمكة بل يرجع إلى منى. والأولى أن يطوف بالبيت يوم النحر بعد الاتيان بمناسك منى ولو لم يتيسر فالحادي عشر، ولا ينبغي تأخيره عنه وقيل بالحرمة كما في روضة المتيقن.

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Delaying the Visit (ziyarah)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2781 - It is narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar, who said: I asked Abu Ibrahim (as) about delaying the visitation of the Kaaba (Tawaf al-Ziyara) until the third day.
Imam (as) said: "Performing it earlier is more beloved to me, but there is no harm if you delay it."
records.arabicText: 2781 - رُوِيَ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ زِيَارَةِ اَلْبَيْتِ تُؤَخَّرُ إِلَى يَوْمِ اَلثَّالِثِ فَقَالَ «تَعْجِيلُهَا أَحَبُّ إِلَيَّ وَ لَيْسَ بِهِ بَأْسٌ إِنْ أَخَّرْتَهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.2781 - It is narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar, who said: I asked Abu Ibrahim (as) about delaying the visitation of the Kaaba (Tawaf al-Ziyara) until the third day.
Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Performing it earlier is more beloved to me, but there is no harm if you delay it."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Delaying the Visit (ziyarah)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2782 - In the narration of Abdullah ibn Sinan from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"There is no harm in delaying the visitation of the Kaaba (Tawaf al-Ziyara) until the Day of Departure (Yawm al-Nafr)."
records.arabicText: 2782 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «لاَ بَأْسَ بِأَنْ تُؤَخَّرَ زِيَارَةُ اَلْبَيْتِ إِلَى يَوْمِ اَلنَّفْرِ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2782 - In the narration of Abdullah ibn Sinan from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "There is no harm in delaying the visitation of the Kaaba (Tawaf al-Ziyara) until the Day of Departure (Yawm al-Nafr)."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Delaying the Visit (ziyarah)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2783 - Ubaydullah ibn Ali al-Halabi narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: I asked him about a man who forgot to perform the visitation of the Kaaba (Tawaf al-Ziyara) until the morning.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in that. I myself sometimes delay it until the days of Tashreeq have passed. However, he must not approach women or use perfume."
records.arabicText: 2783 - وَ رَوَى عُبَيْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ نَسِيَ أَنْ يَزُورَ اَلْبَيْتَ حَتَّى أَصْبَحَ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ أَنَا رُبَّمَا أَخَّرْتُهُ حَتَّى تَذْهَبَ أَيَّامُ اَلتَّشْرِيقِ وَ لَكِنْ لاَ يَقْرَبِ اَلنِّسَاءَ وَ اَلطِّيبَ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2783 - Ubaydullah ibn Ali al-Halabi narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: I asked him about a man who forgot to perform the visitation of the Kaaba (Tawaf al-Ziyara) until the morning.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in that. I myself sometimes delay it until the days of Tashreeq have passed. However, he must not approach women or use perfume."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Delaying the Visit (ziyarah)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2784 - Hisham ibn Salim narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: I asked him about someone who forgot to perform the visitation of the Kaaba (Tawaf al-Ziyara) and returned to their family.
Imam (as) said: "It does not harm them if they have completed their other rites."
records.arabicText: 2784 - وَ رَوَى هِشَامُ بْنُ سَالِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَمَّنْ نَسِيَ زِيَارَةَ اَلْبَيْتِ حَتَّى يَرْجِعَ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ فَقَالَ «لاَ يَضُرُّهُ إِذَا كَانَ قَدْ قَضَى مَنَاسِكَهُ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2784 - Hisham ibn Salim narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: I asked him about someone who forgot to perform the visitation of the Kaaba (Tawaf al-Ziyara) and returned to their family.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "It does not harm them if they have completed their other rites."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Delaying the Visit (ziyarah)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.2785 - Hisham ibn Salim narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: "There is no harm in delaying the visitation of the Kaaba (Tawaf al-Ziyara) until the days of Tashreeq have passed, except that you must not approach women or use perfume."
records.arabicText: 2785 - وَ رَوَى هِشَامُ بْنُ سَالِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «لاَ بَأْسَ إِنْ أَخَّرْتَ زِيَارَةَ اَلْبَيْتِ إِلَى أَنْ تَذْهَبَ أَيَّامُ اَلتَّشْرِيقِ إِلاَّ أَنَّكَ لاَ تَقْرَبُ اَلنِّسَاءَ وَ لاَ اَلطِّيبَ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2785 - Hisham ibn Salim narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "There is no harm in delaying the visitation of the Kaaba (Tawaf al-Ziyara) until the days of Tashreeq have passed, except that you must not approach women or use perfume."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Ruling for One Who Forgets the Tawaf Al-Nisa
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2786 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: I asked him about a man who forgot to perform Tawaf al-Nisa and returned to his family.
Imam (as) said: "He must arrange for someone to perform it on his behalf if he is not performing Hajj again. Women do not become permissible to him until he performs the tawaf of the Kaaba."
records.arabicText: 2786 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ نَسِيَ طَوَافَ اَلنِّسَاءِ حَتَّى رَجَعَ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ قَالَ «يَأْمُرُ أَنْ يُقْضَى عَنْهُ إِنْ لَمْ يَحُجَّ فَإِنَّهُ لاَ تَحِلُّ لَهُ اَلنِّسَاءُ حَتَّى يَطُوفَ بِالْبَيْتِ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2786 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: I asked him about a man who forgot to perform Tawaf al-Nisa and returned to his family.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "He must arrange for someone to perform it on his behalf if he is not performing Hajj again. Women do not become permissible to him until he performs the tawaf of the Kaaba."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Ruling for One Who Forgets the Tawaf Al-Nisa
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2787 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Abu Ayyub Ibrahim ibn Uthman al-Khazzaz, who said: I was with Abu Abdullah (as) in Mecca when a man entered and said: "May Allah (swt) grant you well-being. We have a woman with us who is menstruating and has not performed Tawaf al-Nisa, and the camel driver refuses to stay behind for her."
Imam (as) lowered his head and said: "She cannot stay behind her companions, and her camel driver will not wait for her."
Then Imam (as) raised his head and said: "She may proceed, and her Hajj is complete."
records.arabicText: 2787 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ اَلْخَزَّازِ قَالَ : كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ بِمَكَّةَ فَدَخَلَ عَلَيْهِ رَجُلٌ فَقَالَ أَصْلَحَكَ اَللَّهُ إِنَّ مَعَنَا اِمْرَأَةً حَائِضاً وَ لَمْ تَطُفْ طَوَافَ اَلنِّسَاءِ وَ يَأْبَى اَلْجَمَّالُ أَنْ يُقِيمَ عَلَيْهَا قَالَ فَأَطْرَقَ وَ هُوَ يَقُولُ «لاَ تَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ تَتَخَلَّفَ عَنْ أَصْحَابِهَا وَ لاَ يُقِيمُ عَلَيْهَا جَمَّالُهَا» ثُمَّ رَفَعَ رَأْسَهُ إِلَيْهِ فَقَالَ «تَمْضِي فَقَدْ تَمَّ حَجُّهَا».
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.2787 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Abu Ayyub Ibrahim ibn Uthman al-Khazzaz, who said: I was with Abu Abdullah (as) in Mecca when a man entered and said: "May Allah (swt) grant you well-being. We have a woman with us who is menstruating and has not performed Tawaf al-Nisa, and the camel driver refuses to stay behind for her."
Imam (as) lowered his head and said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"She cannot stay behind her companions, and her camel driver will not wait for her."
Then Imam (as) raised his head and said: "She may proceed, and her Hajj is complete."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Ruling for One Who Forgets the Tawaf Al-Nisa
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2788 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Ali ibn Ri'ab, from Humran ibn A‘yan, from Imam Abu Ja‘far (as), regarding a man who was performing Tawaf al-Nisa and completed five rounds of the Kaaba. He then felt discomfort in his stomach and feared he might lose control, so he went to his residence, relieved himself, and then had intercourse with his maidservant.
Imam (as) said: "He should perform ghusl, then return to the Kaaba to complete the remaining rounds of his tawaf. He should seek forgiveness from his Lord (azj) and not repeat this action."
records.arabicText: 2788 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ حُمْرَانَ بْنِ أَعْيَنَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ كَانَ عَلَيْهِ طَوَافُ اَلنِّسَاءِ وَحْدَهُ فَطَافَ مِنْهُ خَمْسَةَ أَشْوَاطٍ بِالْبَيْتِ ثُمَّ غَمَزَهُ بَطْنُهُ فَخَافَ أَنْ يَبْدُرَهُ فَخَرَجَ إِلَى مَنْزِلِهِ فَنَفَضَ ثُمَّ غَشِيَ جَارِيَتَهُ قَالَ «يَغْتَسِلُ ثُمَّ يَرْجِعُ فَيَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ تَمَامَ مَا بَقِيَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ طَوَافِهِ وَ يَسْتَغْفِرُ رَبَّهُ وَ لاَ يَعُودُ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.2788 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Ali ibn Ri'ab, from Humran ibn A‘yan, from Imam Abu Ja‘far (as), regarding a man who was performing Tawaf al-Nisa and completed five rounds of the Kaaba. He then felt discomfort in his stomach and feared he might lose control, so he went to his residence, relieved himself, and then had intercourse with his maidservant.
Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "He should perform ghusl, then return to the Kaaba to complete the remaining rounds of his tawaf. He should seek forgiveness from his Lord (azj) and not repeat this action."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Ruling for One Who Forgets the Tawaf Al-Nisa
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2789 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Ali ibn Abi Hamzah, from Abu Basir, from Imam Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who forgot to perform Tawaf al-Nisa.
Imam (as) said: "If he has completed more than half of the tawaf and then left forgetting to complete it, he may appoint someone to complete the tawaf on his behalf. In this case, he is permitted to approach women if he has completed more than half of the tawaf."
It is also narrated: "For someone who has left out Tawaf al-Nisa, if they have performed Tawaf al-Wada‘ (the farewell tawaf), it is considered as fulfilling Tawaf al-Nisa."
records.arabicText:
2789 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ نَسِيَ طَوَافَ اَلنِّسَاءِ قَالَ «إِذَا زَادَ عَلَى اَلنِّصْفِ وَ خَرَجَ نَاسِياً أَمَرَ مَنْ يَطُوفُ عَنْهُ وَ لَهُ أَنْ يَقْرَبَ اَلنِّسَاءَ إِذَا زَادَ عَلَى اَلنِّصْفِ ».
وَ رُوِيَ: «فِيمَنْ تَرَكَ طَوَافَ اَلنِّسَاءِ أَنَّهُ إِنْ كَانَ طَافَ طَوَافَ اَلْوَدَاعِ فَهُوَ طَوَافُ اَلنِّسَاءِ ».

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Completion of the walker’s Journey
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2790 - Al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id narrated from Isma‘il ibn Hammam al-Makki, from Abu al-Hasan al-Ridha (as), from his father (as), who said: Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"For someone obligated to walk [during the Hajj rituals], if they have thrown pebbles at the Jamrah, they may visit the Kaaba (for tawaf) while riding."
records.arabicText: 2790 - رَوَى اَلْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ هَمَّامٍ اَلْمَكِّيِّ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ اَلرِّضَا عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «فِي اَلَّذِي عَلَيْهِ اَلْمَشْيُ إِذَا رَمَى اَلْجَمْرَةَ زَارَ اَلْبَيْتَ رَاكِباً».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2790 - Al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id narrated from Isma‘il ibn Hammam al-Makki, from Abu al-Hasan al-Ridha (as), from his father (as), who said: Abu Abdullah (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "For someone obligated to walk [during the Hajj rituals], if they have thrown pebbles at the Jamrah, they may visit the Kaaba (for tawaf) while riding."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Completion of the walker’s Journey
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.2791 - It is narrated: "Whoever makes a vow to walk to the House of Allah (swt) barefoot should walk, but if they become tired, they may ride."
records.arabicText: 2791 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّ مَنْ نَذَرَ أَنْ يَمْشِيَ إِلَى بَيْتِ اَللَّهِ حَافِياً مَشَى فَإِذَا تَعِبَ رَكِبَ ».

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Completion of the walker’s Journey
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.2792 - It is narrated: "They should walk from behind the Maqam (Station of Ibrahim)."
records.arabicText: 2792 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَمْشِي مِنْ خَلْفِ اَلْمَقَامِ ».
